programmes.show_description: Gotta Be Crooked to Get Along in a Crooked World: In the wake of Father Jun's injury, Young Jun steps up for the Hop Wei. (S3, ep 7 of 10)
What appears to be a standard high-speed chase takes a sinister turn when officers search the fugitive's abandoned vehicle. Plus, a fight in a pub gets out of hand. (S5, ep 3)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 6)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 5)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 6)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 9)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 10)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 3)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 4)

Teleshopping.
An angry woman breaks the law but demands police help, a dim car thief is caught on camera and there's the strangest of incidents involving a drive shaft and 11 cars. (S16, ep 11)
Two elderly pedestrians take a wrong turn and dice with death, a taxi driver dumps his passengers on the motorway and police track a car filled with suspected criminals. (S16, ep 12)
An accidental detour leads two Canadians to a dead-end, and an ornate frame holds more than just a picture. Plus, a man is suspected of money laundering. (S2, ep 10)
While an American traveller has trouble recalling his hazy past, bad decisions may keep a rugby player off the pitch. A bag is found in a restricted area, too. (S2, ep 11)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 12)

Drunk Smash: Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers while policing the roads of Australia. (S10, ep 7)
Following Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S10, ep 8)
Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration polices. (S2, ep 1)
Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration polices. (S2, ep 2)
Biosecurity eye rare artefacts from Canada. Two travellers try to outsmart Immigration and there's a sticky situation in Customs. (S12, ep 5)
An irate tourist causes havoc. In Biosecurity, officer Renee uncovers some unwelcome hitchhikers. (S12, ep 6)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 20)

Whispers: When O'Brien returns from a security mission he feels that the entire crew has turned against him.
Point Of No Return: Colonel O'Neill meets a strange man who inexplicably possesses intimate knowledge of the Stargate programme. (S4, ep 11)
Homestead: When Voyager discovers a settlement of oppressed Talaxians living on an asteroid, Neelix feels compelled to help them. (S7, ep 23)
11001001: The Enterprise docks for scheduled computer upgrades. When the system is sabotaged, Data, unable to locate Captain Picard or Commander Riker, takes action.
Border Force are concerned when a man travelling from South America doesn't know the combination to open his suitcase. Officers uncover a backpack filled with drugs. (S15, ep 17)
A deadly parcel turns up at the Mail Centre. A suspicious bottle of cologne is investigated, and a couple are caught with a prohibited item that shocks Biosecurity. (S15, ep 18)
Glen McCurley: Examine the crimes of Glen McCurley, who in 1974 abducted 17-year-old Carla Walker from a bowling alley car park and killed her before leaving her body in a ditch. (S9, ep 1)
Emma Baum: The story of 22-year-old Emma Baum, who was savagely battered to death by her ex-boyfriend David Davies in a row over access to their child.
Civilization: On an Earth-like planet, Archer helps a primitive scientist to work out what is killing the townspeople - and he has his first kiss with an alien. (S1, ep 9)
You Know When You're Losing a Fight: Mai Ling's wedding briefly unites the Hop Wei and Long Zii, but Li Yong receives a grim warning from Kong Pak. (S3, ep 8 of 10)
A burglar is arrested twice within days, a helicopter is used to find a woman heard screaming in a park, and an argument over cigarettes turns nasty. (S5, ep 4)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 7)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 7)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 8)
A lovesick Lithuanian begs for mercy, customs find enough a truckload of cigarettes, and Biosecurity deal with a sneaky pest trying to hitchhike into the country. (S11, ep 1)
A Nigerian national kicks-off with Border agencies, Customs deal with a fishy parcel from Africa, and Immigration talk to a tricky DJ trying to work without a visa. (S11, ep 2)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 5)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 6)

Teleshopping.
A frightening case of road rage unfolds as a drunk man attacks another car with an axe and a truck takes out a car in spectacular fashion. (S16, ep 13)
A pedestrian is lucky to be alive after a stroll down the motorway and a commuter spies another driver doing something he shouldn't. (S16, ep 14)
A traveller's belongings raise repeated alarms, and a man's reasons for studying in Canada may not be academic. Plus, an American couple make the move to Alaska. (S2, ep 12)
A currency dog sniffs out thousands in undeclared cash, and an aspiring actor can't keep track of the plot. Plus, officers arrest a wanted burglar. (S2, ep 13)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 16)

Buckle up! It's time for a new series of Caught on Dashcam. The show that brings you the thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 1)
From distracted drivers to animals on the attack and an unmissable heroic rescue - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam. (S6, ep 2)
Strap in for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam, with more thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 3)
From crazed drivers and ferocious tornadoes to out-of-control driverless cars - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 4)
From rambunctious rammers to disastrous driving conditions - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 5)
Paradise: Sisko and O'Brien are stranded on a planet inhabited by a colony of humans who have rejected any form of technology.
Tangent: A test flight of a recovered Goa'uld death glider goes awry, sending Teal'c and O'Neill hurtling into space. (S4, ep 12)
Renaissance Man: The Doctor must impersonate various crew members when Captain Janeway is abducted and held hostage for Voyager's warp core. (S7, ep 24)
Home Soil: A powerful microscopic life form declares war on humans, takes over the Enterprise's lab and computers and threatens to destroy the ship.
Officers zero in on a passenger returning from China with two extra passports in his bag. A container from Lebanon hides hundreds of illicit items. (S15, ep 19)
A suitcase with unusual lining sets alarm bells ringing. Two women from China have more to declare than they're letting on. (S15, ep 20)
The Body Under the Stairs: A woman's killer remains at large for more than 30 years, until forensic investigators track him down with a tiny clue at the scene. (S2, ep 12)
After his daughter is murdered, a high school coach takes matters into his own hands and hunts down her killers. Violent action thriller. (2023)
